flags.message: CourtListener MCP server was unusable for this cell: every tool call failed with 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store.' Prediction proceeded on the provisioned snapshot/documents, the committed statpack, and fedcourts query priors only; no CourtListener retrieval informed it.

The predict prompt directs predictors to the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section of metrics/statpack.md, but the committed statpack has no such section (only overall, by-court, by-topic, by-originating-circuit, and by-Term tables, and the by-Term rows show 0 resolved cases for every recent Term). Modern cert base rates had to be approximated from the resolved scotus row and fedcourts query era sampling.
